title: About Page Template Content

fields.label: Partners aria label
fields.name: about_partners_aria_label
fields.instructions: Accessible label for the partners marquee section.

fields.label: Marquee duration (seconds)
fields.name: about_partners_marquee_duration
fields.instructions: Animation speed for the scrolling logos.

fields.label: Partner logos
fields.name: about_partners_logos
fields.instructions: Upload all logos in the order they should appear in the marquee.

sub_fields.label: Alt text override
sub_fields.name: alt
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. If empty, image alt text is used.

sub_fields.label: Icon value
sub_fields.name: icon_value
sub_fields.instructions: Phosphor class (e.g. ph-fill ph-check-circle), Lucide icon name, or SVG relative path/attachment ID.

description: Dynamic fields for About page template.
